query:
ALTER TABLE claims
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_detected_incident_type ENUM('collision','theft','hail','fire','vandalism','flood','hijacking','other') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_overridden TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_override_reason TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_overridden_by INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_overridden_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_revalidation_json TEXT NULL;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_detected_incident_type ENUM('collision','theft','hail','fire','vandalism','flood','hijacking','other') NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_overridden TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_override_reason TEXT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS incident_type_overridden_by INT NULL,
